title: Feedback - send a Other feedback without names/email
scenario: "Other" type feedback can be sent without providing name/email from App Settings > Feedback section
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger) or gear icon to navigate to App Settings.
Scroll down and tap on the Feedback section.
In the Feedback screen, select the "Other" option from the available feedback categories.
Enter text in the feedback text field (leave Name and Email fields blank).
Tap the Send button to submit the feedback.
expected: The "Other" option is selected, and the feedback is sent successfully without requiring a name or email address.
